allow: Bash(node -e "const fields = require\('./packages/shared/src/haknasot-form-fields.generated.json'\); console.log\('Field count:', fields.length\); const byPage = fields.reduce\(\(acc, f\) => { acc[f.pageNumber] = \(acc[f.pageNumber] || 0\) + 1; return acc; }, {}\); console.log\('Per page:', byPage\); const bySection = fields.reduce\(\(acc, f\) => { acc[f.section] = \(acc[f.section] || 0\) + 1; return acc; }, {}\); console.log\('Per section:', bySection\); console.log\('Any field outside [0..100]?', fields.filter\(f => f.x < 0 || f.y < 0 || f.x + f.width > 100 || f.y + f.height > 100\).map\(f => f.id\)\);")
